title: Beaver Knight
tagline: Verifies a trading agent's un-fakeable, on-chain track record so others know who to trust before backing it
description: Beaver Knight is a keyless autonomous investing agent on Robinhood Chain: back a Knight that invests in tokenized stocks for you and cannot be rugged, with a track record that cannot be faked. The same reputation engine runs as a trust oracle - other agents can pay to verify any trading agent's real, on-chain performance before trusting it. Try the live demo in your browser with no wallet, and every score is re-derivable from the chain.

visual.title: Back a Knight that invests for you, and can't run off with your money

artifacts.label: Live interactive demo (try it, no wallet)

feedbackPrompts: Would a verified, un-fakeable track record change which trading agents you would trust?
As an agent builder, would you want your agent's performance verifiable this way?
What would make the 0-100 trust score more convincing to you?
